name: Bridgeline Digital, Inc.
business: Bridgeline Digital is an AI-powered marketing technology company that offers a suite of products that help companies grow online revenue. The products include HawkSearch (AI-powered site search), Celebros Search, WooRank (SEO audit), Unbound (Digital Experience Platform), TruPresence (franchise marketing), and OrchestraCMS (Salesforce-native CMS). The company sells to mid-sized and large companies across various verticals.

exposures.sentence: HawkSearch is an AI-powered site search, recommendation, and personalization software application for marketers to enhance an online customer's product discovery.

Bridgeline Digital is an AI-powered marketing technology company that offers a suite of products that help companies grow online revenue by driving more visitors to their websites, converting more visitors to purchasers, and increasing average order value per purchaser.
We host our SaaS and managed hosting customers via a third-party, Amazon Web Services.
